audit_items.proof_trace: The transfer guard `if (hasFeeAggregator)` is false only when `s_feeAggregator == address(this)`, which is an explicitly permitted configuration (L569 of `_setFeeAggregator` carves out `address(this)` from the interface check). In that self-hosted configuration, unsold assets already reside at the fee aggregator (the contract itself), so no transfer is required and assets are not stuck.
